seoTitle: Nollamara vs Nomans Lake — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nollamara and Nomans Lake. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Nollamara vs Nomans Lake: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nollamara and Nomans Lake.
heading: Nollamara vs Nomans Lake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nollamara, Western Australia and Nomans Lake, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nollamara has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Nomans Lake (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nollamara or Nomans Lake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nollamara has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Nomans Lake scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nollamara scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Nomans Lake scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nollamara or Nomans Lake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nollamara has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
